with open('predict.py', 'r') as f:
    lines = f.readlines()

print(f'Total lines: {len(lines)}')
print('=== LINES 0-90 ===')
for i in range(0, min(90, len(lines))):
    print(f'{i:4d}: {lines[i]}', end='')
print('\n=== LINES 150-330 ===')
for i in range(150, min(330, len(lines))):
    print(f'{i:4d}: {lines[i]}', end='')
